---
title: "Karol Bolbotowski"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:k.bolbotowski@mimuw.edu.pl"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/YOUR-GITHUB-USERNAME"
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR-ID"
---

I am a mathematician interested in **[your area 1]**, **[your area 2]**, and **[your area 3]**.

My current research focuses on:

- [Research topic 1]
- [Research topic 2]
- [Research topic 3]

You can find my publications, preprints, teaching materials, and contact information on this website.

## News

- **June 2026:** Website launched.
- **[Month Year]:** [Add recent paper, talk, course, or conference item.]

## Selected publications

1. [Author list], *Title of paper*, Journal / arXiv, year.
2. [Author list], *Title of paper*, Journal / arXiv, year.

See the [publications page](publications.qmd) for a fuller list.
